description: Reproduce diff application failure: adding three perf-counter initializations (n_hit, n_miss, t_stat) inside collect_global_chats(). The body of collect_global_chats already references these names (n_hit, n_miss, t_stat) without initialization, mirroring the structure of collect_global_chat_summaries which DOES initialize them. The diff inserts the missing initializations at @@ -73,6 +73,9 @@. This test references the actual current state of app/storage/global_items.py.
